<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
  <title>Felices Pascuas</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Pacifico&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; }

    html, body { width:100%; }

    body {
      min-height: 100vh;
      /* White almost everywhere, tiny gold hint only at screen edges */
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 45%,
        #FFFFFF  0%,
        #FFFFFF  72%,
        #FFFCF2  84%,
        #FFF3CC 100%);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
      text-align: center;
    }

    /* floating bg */
    .bg-float {
      position: fixed;
      pointer-events: none;
      font-size: 1.4rem;
      animation: floatUp linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes floatUp {
      0%   { transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(0deg);   opacity: 0   }
      8%   { opacity: .12 }
      92%  { opacity: .12 }
      100% { transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(360deg); opacity: 0   }
    }

    .subtitle {
      color: #8B5E28;
      font-size: .9rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-bottom: .9rem;
      letter-spacing: .3px;
      position: relative;
    }

    /* ── egg stage ── */
    .stage {
      width: 78vw;
      max-width: 280px;
      aspect-ratio: 3/4;
      position: relative;
      cursor: pointer;
      touch-action: manipulation;
      -webkit-user-select: none;
      user-select: none;
      display: block;
      margin: 0 auto;
      /* tabindex + role make it tappable in any WebView */
    }

    .egg-img {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0; left: 0;
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      object-fit: contain;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity .3s ease;
      pointer-events: none;
      display: block;
    }
    .egg-img.active { opacity: 1; }

    /* shakes */
    @keyframes sh1 { 0%,100%{transform:rotate(0) translateX(0)} 30%{transform:rotate(-4deg) translateX(-3px)} 70%{transform:rotate(4deg) translateX(3px)} }
    @keyframes sh2 { 0%,100%{transform:rotate(0) scale(1)} 25%{transform:rotate(-6deg) scale(1.02) translateX(-4px)} 60%{transform:rotate(6deg) scale(.98) translateX(4px)} }
    @keyframes sh3 { 0%,100%{transform:rotate(0) scale(1)} 15%{transform:rotate(-9deg) scale(1.03) translateX(-5px)} 40%{transform:rotate(9deg) scale(.97) translateX(5px)} 70%{transform:rotate(-7deg) scale(1.02) translateX(-3px)} }
    @keyframes sh4 { 0%,100%{transform:rotate(0) scale(1)} 10%{transform:rotate(-12deg) scale(1.05) translateX(-6px)} 28%{transform:rotate(12deg) scale(.95) translateX(6px)} 46%{transform:rotate(-11deg) scale(1.04) translateX(-5px)} 64%{transform:rotate(11deg) scale(.96) translateX(5px)} 82%{transform:rotate(-8deg) scale(1.02) translateX(-3px)} }

    /* vibrations */
    @keyframes vib1 { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)} 25%{transform:translate(-1.5px,.5px)} 75%{transform:translate(1.5px,-.5px)} }
    @keyframes vib2 { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)} 20%{transform:translate(-2.5px,1px)} 40%{transform:translate(2.5px,-.8px)} 60%{transform:translate(-2px,1px)} 80%{transform:translate(1.5px,-1px)} }
    @keyframes vib3 { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)} 12%{transform:translate(-4px,1.5px)} 25%{transform:translate(4px,-1px)} 37%{transform:translate(-3px,2px)} 50%{transform:translate(3.5px,-1.5px)} 62%{transform:translate(-3px,.8px)} 75%{transform:translate(2.5px,-2px)} 87%{transform:translate(-2px,1px)} }

    .stage.sh1 { animation: sh1 .32s ease-in-out }
    .stage.sh2 { animation: sh2 .40s ease-in-out }
    .stage.sh3 { animation: sh3 .50s ease-in-out }
    .stage.sh4 { animation: sh4 .60s ease-in-out }
    .stage.vib1 { animation: vib1 .16s linear infinite }
    .stage.vib2 { animation: vib2 .12s linear infinite }
    .stage.vib3 { animation: vib3 .08s linear infinite }

    /* break */
    @keyframes eggFly {
      0%   { transform: scale(1) rotate(0) translateY(0); opacity: 1 }
      100% { transform: scale(.6) rotate(-30deg) translateY(-240px); opacity: 0 }
    }
    .stage.breaking .egg-img.active {
      animation: eggFly .65s cubic-bezier(.4,0,1,1) forwards !important;
      opacity: 1 !important;
    }

    /* confetti */
    .cf-stage { position:fixed; top:50%; left:50%; pointer-events:none; z-index:30 }
    .cp { position:absolute; opacity:0 }
    @keyframes cpFly {
      0%   { transform:translate(0,0) rotate(0deg) scale(1); opacity:1 }
      80%  { opacity:.9 }
      100% { transform:translate(var(--tx),var(--ty)) rotate(var(--rot)) scale(.3); opacity:0 }
    }

    /* overlay */
    .overlay {
      position: fixed; inset: 0;
      background: rgba(60,30,0,.5);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      z-index: 35; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity .45s;
    }
    .overlay.show { opacity:1; pointer-events:auto }

    /* ── GOLDEN TICKET ── */
    .ticket-wrap {
      position: fixed; top: 50%; left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%,-50%) scale(0) rotate(-6deg);
      z-index: 40; max-width: 320px; width: 88%;
      transition: transform .6s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
      filter: drop-shadow(0 25px 60px rgba(160,100,0,.5))
              drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(200,134,10,.25));
    }
    .ticket-wrap.show { transform: translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1) rotate(0deg) }

    .ticket-shell { position: relative }

    .ticket-shell::before {
      content:''; position:absolute;
      top:-12px; left:0; right:0; height:12px;
      background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 10px 12px, #FFFEF0 12px, transparent 12px);
      background-size: 20px 12px; background-repeat: repeat-x;
    }
    .ticket-shell::after {
      content:''; position:absolute;
      bottom:-12px; left:0; right:0; height:12px;
      background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 10px 0px, #F0C038 12px, transparent 12px);
      background-size: 20px 12px; background-repeat: repeat-x;
    }

    .ticket {
      background: linear-gradient(165deg,#FFFEF0 0%,#FFF8CC 28%,#FFE070 58%,#F0C038 100%);
      border-radius: 0; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    }
    .ticket::after {
      content:''; position:absolute; top:-50%; left:-60%;
      width:40%; height:200%;
      background: linear-gradient(105deg,transparent 38%,rgba(255,255,255,.42) 50%,transparent 62%);
      animation: shimmer 3.5s 1s infinite; pointer-events:none;
    }
    @keyframes shimmer { 0%{ left:-60% } 100%{ left:130% } }

    .ticket-inner {
      padding: 1.5rem 1.5rem 1.3rem;
      border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5);
      border-radius: 0; text-align:center; position:relative;
    }
    .ticket-inner::before {
      content:''; position:absolute; inset:7px;
      border: 1.5px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.45);
      border-radius: 0; pointer-events:none;
    }

    .ticket-title {
      font-family: 'Pacifico', cursive;
      font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 6.5vw, 1.95rem);
      color: #3A1800;
      text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.4);
      line-height: 1.2;
    }
    .ticket-divider { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin:.7rem 0 }
    .ticket-divider span { flex:1; height:1px; background:rgba(80,40,0,.2) }
    .ticket-divider i { font-size:.8rem; font-style:normal; color:rgba(80,40,0,.4) }

    .ticket-body {
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-style: italic; font-weight: 700;
      font-size: clamp(.92rem, 3.4vw, 1.12rem);
      color: #3A1800; line-height: 1.65;
    }
    .ticket-body strong { font-style:normal; font-size:1.05em }
    .ticket-body .te-amo {
      display: block;
      margin-top: .75rem;
      padding-top: .6rem;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(80,40,0,.15);
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-style: italic;
      font-weight: 400;
      font-size: 1.05em;
      letter-spacing: .3px;
      color: #4A2000;
    }

    .ticket-stamp {
      display: inline-block; margin-top: .85rem;
      border: 2px solid rgba(60,30,0,.28); border-radius: 4px;
      padding: .18rem .7rem;
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-style: italic;
      font-size: .65rem; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: rgba(60,30,0,.45); text-transform: uppercase;
      transform: rotate(-2deg);
    }
    .save-btn {
      margin-top: 1rem; display: block; width: 100%;
      background: #3A1800; color: #F5D060;
      border: none; border-radius: 50px;
      padding: .6rem 1rem;
      font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: .88rem;
      cursor: pointer; letter-spacing: .5px;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.25), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.1);
      touch-action: manipulation; -webkit-appearance: none;
    }
    .ticket-disclaimer {
      margin-top: .75rem;
      font-size: .65rem; color: rgba(58,24,0,.48);
      line-height: 1.5; font-style: italic;
    }

    /* ── Prize visual cards ── */
    .prize-cards {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: flex-end;
      gap: 0;
      margin: .5rem 0 1.2rem;
      position: relative;
    }
    .prize-card {
      background: #fff;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 5px 5px 14px;
      box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(80,40,0,.22), 0 1px 4px rgba(80,40,0,.12);
      overflow: hidden;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .prize-card img {
      display: block;
      border-radius: 4px;
      object-fit: cover;
    }
    .shirt-card {
      width: 52%;
      transform: rotate(-6deg);
      transform-origin: bottom right;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
    }
    .shirt-card img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1/1; }
    .egg-card {
      width: 30%;
      transform: rotate(5deg);
      transform-origin: bottom left;
      margin-left: -22px;   /* overlap on top of shirt */
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
    }
    .egg-card img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 3/4; object-fit: contain; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <span class="bg-float" style="left:4%;  animation-duration:9s;  animation-delay:0s">✨</span>
  <span class="bg-float" style="left:13%; animation-duration:12s; animation-delay:3s">🍫</span>
  <span class="bg-float" style="left:23%; animation-duration:8s;  animation-delay:1.5s">🐰</span>
  <span class="bg-float" style="left:36%; animation-duration:11s; animation-delay:.5s">⭐</span>
  <span class="bg-float" style="left:50%; animation-duration:13s; animation-delay:6s">🐰</span>
  <span class="bg-float" style="left:61%; animation-duration:9s;  animation-delay:2.5s">🍫</span>
  <span class="bg-float" style="left:73%; animation-duration:10s; animation-delay:4s">🐰</span>
  <span class="bg-float" style="left:83%; animation-duration:8.5s;animation-delay:7s">🌟</span>
  <span class="bg-float" style="left:92%; animation-duration:11s; animation-delay:1s">💛</span>

  <p class="subtitle">Dale unos toquecitos al huevo 👆</p>

  <!-- onclick como atributo HTML: máxima compatibilidad con cualquier WebView -->
  <div class="stage" id="stage"
       onclick="tap()"
       role="button"
       tabindex="0"
       aria-label="Romper el huevo">
    <img id="egg-0"    class="egg-img active" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
    <img id="egg-1"    class="egg-img"        src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
    <img id="egg-2"    class="egg-img"        src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
    <img id="egg-3"    class="egg-img"        src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
    <img id="egg-4"    class="egg-img"        src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
    <img id="egg-open" class="egg-img"        src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
  </div>

  <div class="cf-stage" id="cfStage"></div>
  <div class="overlay"  id="overlay"></div>

  <div class="ticket-wrap" id="ticketWrap">
    <div class="ticket-shell">
      <div class="ticket">
        <div class="ticket-inner">
          <div class="ticket-title">Felices Pascuas<br>mi amor</div>
          <div class="prize-cards">
            <div class="prize-card shirt-card">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="remera Nude Project"/>
            </div>
            <div class="prize-card egg-card">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="huevo Ferrero Rocher"/>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="ticket-divider"><span></span><i>✦</i><span></span></div>
          <div class="ticket-body">
            Vale por una remera de<br>
            <em style="font-style:normal;font-weight:700;font-size:1.06em;">Nude Project</em><br>
            y un huevo de pascua real.<br>
            <span class="te-amo">— Te amo. 💕</span>
          </div>
          <button class="save-btn"
                  onclick="event.stopPropagation(); alert('📸 Tomá una captura de pantalla para guardar tu vale.')">
            🎫 Guardar vale
          </button>
          <div class="ticket-disclaimer">
            * Al presentar este vale, la persona que lo canjea recibe de bonus un beso
            de parte del emisor. No acumulable con otros vales. Sin fecha de vencimiento.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    var MAX = 5, count = 0, broken = false;

    var STATES = {
      1: { img:'egg-1', vib:'vib1', shake:'sh1' },
      2: { img:'egg-2', vib:'vib1', shake:'sh2' },
      3: { img:'egg-3', vib:'vib2', shake:'sh3' },
      4: { img:'egg-4', vib:'vib2', shake:'sh4' },
      5: { img:'egg-4', vib:'vib3', shake:'sh4' }
    };

    function setEgg(id) {
      var imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.egg-img');
      for (var i = 0; i < imgs.length; i++) imgs[i].classList.remove('active');
      document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
    }

    function setVib(cls) {
      var s = document.getElementById('stage');
      s.classList.remove('vib1','vib2','vib3');
      if (cls) s.classList.add(cls);
    }

    function tap() {
      if (broken) return;
      count++;
      var s = STATES[count];
      if (!s) return;

      setEgg(s.img);
      setVib(null);

      var stage = document.getElementById('stage');
      stage.classList.remove('sh1','sh2','sh3','sh4');
      // force reflow so animation restarts
      stage.style.display = 'none';
      stage.offsetHeight;
      stage.style.display = '';
      stage.classList.add(s.shake);

      var vib = s.vib;
      setTimeout(function() {
        stage.classList.remove('sh1','sh2','sh3','sh4');
        setVib(vib);
      }, 680);

      if (count >= MAX) {
        broken = true;
        setTimeout(explode, 80);
      }
    }

    function explode() {
      setVib(null);
      var stage = document.getElementById('stage');
      stage.classList.add('breaking');
      spawnConfetti();
      setTimeout(function() {
        stage.classList.remove('breaking');
        var imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.egg-img');
        for (var i = 0; i < imgs.length; i++) {
          imgs[i].classList.remove('active');
          imgs[i].style.animation = '';
        }
        setEgg('egg-open');
      }, 660);
      setTimeout(function() {
        document.getElementById('overlay').classList.add('show');
        document.getElementById('ticketWrap').classList.add('show');
      }, 860);
    }

    function spawnConfetti() {
      var cols = ['#F2C96E','#E8A020','#FFF3B0','#C8860A','#FFE07D','#FFFACD','#D4A800','#ffffff'];
      var cf = document.getElementById('cfStage');
      for (var i = 0; i < 90; i++) {
        var cp = document.createElement('div');
        cp.className = 'cp';
        var a = Math.random() * 360, d = 100 + Math.random() * 270;
        var tx = Math.cos(a * Math.PI / 180) * d;
        var ty = Math.sin(a * Math.PI / 180) * d - 90;
        var sz = 6 + Math.random() * 13;
        var dur = .5 + Math.random() * .9;
        var dly = Math.random() * .35;
        var rot = Math.random() * 720 - 360;
        var col = cols[Math.floor(Math.random() * cols.length)];
        var br = Math.random() > .5 ? '50%' : '3px';
        cp.style.cssText = 'background:' + col + ';width:' + sz + 'px;height:' + sz + 'px;' +
          'border-radius:' + br + ';--tx:' + tx + 'px;--ty:' + ty + 'px;--rot:' + rot + 'deg;' +
          'animation:cpFly ' + dur + 's ease-out ' + dly + 's forwards';
        cf.appendChild(cp);
      }
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>
